content: when in combat i cant check what the Orisons do, i feel like i need to learn them all by heart, can there be a way to read the card when in combat without picking it up? bc it causes situations where i pick the card up to read it and accidently play it - this happens most when the character is new or was forced into the formation bc of the story/lore/challange
if you click-hold/tap-hold the card you should be able to view it, a pop-up usually appears on the side
